text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh my? I hear festival music off in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished shopping, Mejiro Ardan and I are
strolling around town when we hear music. We
follow the sound to find...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, fancy seeing the two of you here! You
droppin' by for the festival, too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Inari. Why yes... We were drawn here by
the music, you see.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Then you go have yourselves a blast! Festivals
don't happen every day, and the dancing's just
getting started!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'd very much like to... but I'm unfamiliar
with the moves of this particular dance.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Say what now? Hey, don't go sweating the small
stuff. With this kinda thing, if you're havin' fun,
you've already won!
choice_data_list: Let's just dance along in our own styles.

I guess... let's just copy what everyone else is
doing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I suppose... the rhythm isn't too far from a waltz.
If I just adjust the steps to the tempo...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa?! Well, I'll be! Looks like you've got the
knack, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Your dancing's so pretty! I wanna dance
like you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I see. Well then, let's give it our best attempt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff! H-hup!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa?! Well, I'll be! Looks like you've got the
knack, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Festival Veteran
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Nice form there! But we've got some nifty
moves ourselves, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oho! I know that look! You went and had yourself
a good old time, didn't ya?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That I did... The hearts of strangers coming
together through dance. I see now, Inari. In your
eyes, festivals are—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: One and the same as winning concerts!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've always been curious as to why your winning
concerts are so lively... and why my heart dances
along as I watch them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I've come to believe it may be because we all
share the inherent ability to communicate with
others through dance.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gee, uh... Can't say I've ever put much thought
into how it all fits together like that.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But I love me a festival, and knowing you
enjoyed that one sure puts a smile on my face!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During our time at the festival, we come to learn
something about concerts!
